Modified:

Modified: head/games/freedoko/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/freedoko/Makefile	Sat May 17 10:53:20 2014	(r354309)
+++ head/games/freedoko/Makefile	Sat May 17 10:53:48 2014	(r354310)
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	libgnet-2.0.so:${PORTSDIR}/
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME:C/\.src$//}/src
 
-USES=		gmake pkgconfig zip
+USES=		gmake pkgconfig zip:infozip
 USE_GNOME=	gtkmm24
 MAKE_ENV=	OS="${OPSYS}" DATADIR="${DATADIR}" DOCSDIR="${DOCSDIR}"
